title: John Penfold | Focused Photograpic
text:
Email
  
  
    
     My e-bay
  
  
    
     07917 116974
  






I’d love to hear from you … whether you’re buying, selling or just want some guidance
You’re always welcome to visit me in Leeds or meet me at my usual spot at the main UK camera fairs (including Photographica, Wolverhampton and Frome)
After starting in the camera business in 1990, I’ve run Focused Photographic since 2004, giving great customer service and usually focusing on Hasselblad and Nikon
